# Handoff: ship → next issue

## Shipped
- Issue #[number] closed
- PR #[pr-number] merged to main
- Commit: [short SHA]

## Deployment Notes
- Migration applied: [yes/no]
- Feature flag: [name, if applicable]
- Rollback: [how to revert]

## Queue Status
- Completed: #N1, #N2
- Next: #N3 — [title]
- Remaining: [count] issues
- Blocked: #[N] waiting on [HITL resolution / other issue]
